chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No.D-4227 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of case For hearing of main case 02.10.2024 Mr. Raja Babar Hamid, advocate for the petitioners Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General, Pakistan Mr. Muhammad Khalid Dogar, advocate for respondents 3 and 4 Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for respondent No.5 ************ Today, learned counsel for the Respondent/ Department has filed compliance report dated 01.10.2024 and it is submitted that these goods in question have been released in line with the judgment, passed by this Court in the case of Muhammad Naeem versus Federation of Pakistan & Others [C.P. No.D-5575 of 2023]. The same is taken on record. The purpose of filing of this petition has been served; therefore, the same is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
